About Us

Simplifying Employee Benefits for a Better Tomorrow.

Advanced Benefit Designs: Financial Planning Company

I have spent more than 25 years in the insurance industry, growing from sales associate to manager and director in health insurance.
In 2000, I founded Advanced Benefit Designs in Doylestown, PA. We partner with local independent businesses to build group benefit programs that protect owners and employees. Our customized strategies help businesses attract and retain top talent while preparing for a successful retirement.

Kevin Smith

Let's Talk

OUr Mission

At Advanced Benefit Designs, we create financial strategies to help protect you, your family, your estate, and your business. We use proven planning tools to build strong retirement strategies and help keep your legacy secure.

Core Values : Your Reliable Financial Partner for Life

At Advanced Benefit Designs, we uphold integrity, client focus, innovation, and reliability in everything we do. We are committed to transparent, client-centric, forward-thinking benefits solutions that businesses and employees can trust.

Integrity

We prioritize honesty and transparency in everything we do.

Customer-Centric

Our clients' needs always come first.

Innovation

We continuously evolve to provide the best benefits solutions.

Reliability

We are committed to delivering consistent and trustworthy services.

Common Misconceptions We Help Clear Up

“I’ll deal with this later.”

Waiting often limits options. Early planning creates flexibility, not commitment.

“I already have coverage.”

Coverage doesn’t always equal strategy. Alignment matters more than ownership.

“This is only for the wealthy.”

Smart planning is about decisions, not net worth.

“One plan lasts forever.”

Financial strategies must adapt as life evolves.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is Advanced Benefit Designs?
We are an independent financial advisory firm focused on risk management, retirement planning, and long-term financial clarity for individuals, families, and business owners.
Why consider Long-Term Care planning?
Long-term care planning protects your independence and finances if illness or injury impacts daily living. It helps cover care costs without draining savings or burdening family members.
How does tax-free retirement planning work?
Through strategic use of insurance-based and tax-advantaged tools, we help structure income streams that reduce exposure to future tax increases.
Do you help business owners?
Yes. We assist with employee benefits, succession planning, key-person protection, and strategies that help preserve business value.
Is this only for high-net-worth clients?
No. Our strategies are scalable and designed for people who want to make smarter financial decisions, regardless of where they are today.

No Pressure. No Obligation. Just Clarity.

A conversation designed to help you understand your options— even if you decide not to move forward.

Schedule a Conversation

content.rendered:
Life Insurance solutions

Protect your Family's future & build a lasting legacy

comprehensive protection for your loved ones

A solid financial plan begins with protection you can trust. Life insurance provides the peace of mind that comes from knowing your family is financially secure no matter what the future holds. Whether you need to cover a mortgage, fund a child’s education, or replace lost income. We tailor our coverage to fit your unique American lifestyle and financial goals.

Life insurance: what is it?

Life Insurance is a vital financial contract that provides your beneficiaries with a tax-free lump sum payment in the event of your passing, ensuring your family’s standard of living is preserved and their future is protected.

  • Financial Safety Net: A tax-free death benefit that provides immediate liquidity to your beneficiaries.
  • Mortgage Protection: Ensures your family can stay in their home by covering outstanding debt.
  • Wealth Transfer: Create a legacy that passes on more than assets — pass on security, stability, and tax-free financial strength.  
  • Peace of Mind: Knowing that your final expenses and your family’s daily needs are fully accounted for.

Equity Indexed Universal Life Insurance

A strategic financial tool that blends protection and indexed growth to help create predictable, tax-efficient income for retirement.  
 

Whole Life Insurance

Permanent coverage that builds cash value over time with fixed premiums.

Term Life Insurance

Affordable, straightforward protection for a specific period (10, 20, or 30 years).

Final Expense Coverage

Simplified policies designed to cover funeral costs and small remaining debts.

Living Benefits

Policies that pay you tax-free benefits while you are alive when stricken with catastrophic illnesses and/or injuries that are listed in the policy.

Why Choose Life insurance?

IS LIFE INSURANCE RIGHT FOR YOU?

Life insurance is a vital tool for anyone with people who depend on them. Whether you are a new parent, a homeowner, or a business owner, a tailored strategy ensures that your ‘financial footprint’ remains a positive one.

Let’s explore which policy best supports your family’s long-term security

Contact Us

Retirement calculator

Estimate how much you need to save

Do you know how much you need to save for a comfortable and secure retirement?

Our retirement calculator helps you determine whether you’re on track to reach your long-term retirement goals.

With this easy-to-use tool, you can:

  • View your current retirement savings balance

  • Estimate annual withdrawals throughout retirement

  • Track how long your savings may last based on your plan

Social Security benefits are calculated on a sliding scale based on your income history. If you include a non-working spouse in your retirement plan, your potential Social Security benefits may increase—up to the allowable maximum.

Use this calculator to gain clarity, identify gaps, and take confident steps toward a financially secure retirement.

content.rendered:
RETIREMENT & INCOME PLANNING

Smart Strategies to Help You Retire Confidently

USE ROTH IRA CONVERSIONS FOR TAX-FREE RETIREMENT INCOME

The goal of retirement planning is to maximize your wealth while lowering your taxes, not just save money. You can accomplish both with Indexed Universal Life Insurance (IUL). In addition to offering a tax-advantaged retirement income stream, this potent financial tool protects your money from market downturns and offers market growth potential.

Use Indexed Universal Life Insurance for Smart Retirement Planning Strategies

You can withdraw your original contributions at any time without penalties or taxes, giving you emergency flexibility.

Traditional IRA

  • Contributions are typically tax-deductible.
  • Taxes are deferred until you withdraw the money in retirement.
  • Required Minimum Distributions (RMDs) start at age 73, meaning you must take taxable withdrawals whether you need the money or not.
No Cost, No Pressure Consultation

Roth IRA

  • Contributions are made with after-tax dollars (no upfront tax deduction).
  • Growth and withdrawals are completely tax-free in retirement (as long as they’re qualified).
  • No RMDs during your lifetime, allowing your money to grow tax-free indefinitely.
  • Heirs can inherit a Roth IRA tax-free, making it a powerful estate planning tool.
Book Your Free Consultation

SPOUSAL RETIREMENT PLANNING: BUILDING A PLAN TOGETHER

For couples, planning together is key to maximising benefits and minimising risks. Spousal retirement planning ensures both partners are protected when transitioning from employer coverage to Medicare or other retirement income strategies.

  • Coordinated dual-income strategies.
  • Protection for the surviving spouse.
  • Lower household taxes through smart withdrawal sequencing.  
THE POWER OF INTEGRATED
RETIREMENT STRATEGIES

Unlike relying on a single account or product, combining strategies like Roth IRA conversions, employer plan reviews, and spousal coordination allows you to build a diversified and tax-efficient retirement plan. With expert guidance, you can create predictable income streams, reduce tax burdens, and enjoy retirement with true confidence.

Contact Us

Privacy Policy

Effective Date: 21-08-2025 

At Advanced Benefits Designs, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website https://advancedbenefitdesigns.com or use our varied range of services, including Tax-free retirement, Mortgage Protection, Medicare Insurance. etc. 

By using our website, you agree to the practices described in this policy.

1. Information We Collect

We may collect the following types of information:

  • Information you provide directly
    • Name, email, phone number, or other contact information when you request quotes, consultations, or subscribe to updates.
    • Personal details you share when inquiring about insurance coverage, retirement income strategies, or related services.
  • Information we collect automatically
    • Website usage details such as IP address, browser type, device information, and pages visited (through cookies or analytics tools).
  • Information from third parties
    • Where permitted, we may receive information from service providers to help verify your identity or provide relevant solutions.
2. How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect to:

  • Provide you with insurance and retirement planning information and services.
  • Respond to inquiries and service requests.
  • Send you relevant updates, newsletters, or offers (with your consent).
  • Analyze website performance to improve user experience.
  • Comply with legal, regulatory, and compliance obligations.
3. Cookies & Tracking Technologies

Our website uses cookies and similar technologies to:

  • Ensure proper functionality of our site.
  • Remember user preferences.
  • Measure website traffic and improve services.
  • Provide relevant marketing messages.

You may disable cookies through your browser settings, but certain features of the site may not work properly.

4. How We Share Your Information

We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information only in these situations:

  • With trusted service providers who assist us in delivering insurance or retirement planning services.
  • To comply with legal or regulatory obligations.
  • To protect the rights, property, or safety of our business, clients, or others.
5. Data Security

We use reasonable safeguards to protect your personal and financial information from unauthorised access or disclosure. However, no online system can be guaranteed completely secure.

6. Your Rights and Choices

You have the right to:

  • Opt out of receiving marketing or promotional emails.
  • Request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data (subject to applicable laws).
  • Limit certain uses of your personal information.

To exercise your rights, please contact us (see below).

7. Children’s Privacy 

Our services are intended for adults considering insurance and retirement income plans. We do not knowingly collect information from children under 13. If we become aware that we have collected such information, we will delete it promptly.

8. Contact Us

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or how your information is handled, please contact us at:

Advanced Benefits Designs
  Email: [Insert contact email]
  Address: [Insert business address]
  Phone: [Insert phone number]

9. Updates to This Policy

We reserve the right to update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted here with a new “Effective Date.” We encourage you to review this page periodically.

Terms & Conditions

Welcome to Advanced Benefits Designs. By accessing or using our website https://advancedbenefitdesigns.com, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use this site.

  • You agree to use the Site only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms.

The information on this Site and the services provided by Advanced Benefits Designs include guidance on insurance solutions, retirement income planning, and tax-saving strategies. While we strive to provide accurate and reliable financial information, the content on this Site is for educational and informational purposes only and may not be tailored to your specific situation.

You should consult directly with a licensed insurance professional or financial advisor from our team before making any decisions regarding your insurance coverage or retirement income strategy.

4. Third-Party Links

Our Site may contain links to third-party websites. These are provided for convenience only. We do not endorse or control these websites and are not responsible for their content or privacy practices.

5. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law:

  • Advanced Benefits Designs shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of this Site or reliance on its content.

     

  • We make no warranties, express or implied, about the accuracy, reliability, or availability of this Site.
6. Privacy

Your use of this Site is also governed by our [Privacy Policy]. By using the Site, you consent to the collection and use of information as described there.

7. Changes to Terms

We may update these Terms & Conditions at any time without prior notice. Changes will be effective upon posting to the Site. Continued use of the Site means you accept the revised Terms.

8. Governing Law

These Terms & Conditions shall be governed by and construed under the laws of the State of Pennsylvania, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

9. Contact Us

If you have questions about these Terms, please contact us at:

Advanced Benefits Designs

Address: Advanced Benefit Designs 2225 Dorchester Street East Furlong, PA 18925
Phone: 215-262-5456

Medicare Insurance Plans

Presenting Advanced Benefit Designs' Medicare Services

Using Medicare Expertise to Strengthen Your Health Journey

Our goal at Advanced Benefit Designs is to improve the health of the people in Doylestown, Pennsylvania, and beyond. With the goal of offering individualized advice and support for your healthcare needs, we are thrilled to announce the addition of Medicare Services to our extensive suite of offerings.

What is an IUL and How Does It Work?

An Indexed Universal Life Insurance (IUL) policy is a unique wealth-building strategy that combines life insurance protection with a cash value component that grows based on the performance of a stock market index, such as the S&P 500. Unlike traditional investments, an IUL allows you to benefit from market growth without the risk of losing money due to market crashes.

Personalized
Consultations

Understanding your unique healthcare needs to recommend the most suitable Medicare options.

Help with Enrollment

assisting you with the enrollment procedure to guarantee accurate and timely application submissions.

Continuous Assistance

providing ongoing support to handle any inquiries or modifications to your medical needs.

Comprehending Medicare Insurance

Medicare is a federal health insurance program that primarily serves people 65 and older, as well as some younger people with disabilities. It is composed of multiple components.

Our Medicare Insurance Plans

It can be difficult to navigate Medicare’s complexities. Our objective is to streamline this procedure by providing

Comprehending Medicare Insurance

Medicare is a federal health insurance program that primarily serves people 65 and older, as well as some younger people with disabilities. It is composed of multiple components.

  • Hospital Insurance

    Inpatient hospital stays, skilled nursing facility care, hospice care, and certain home health services are covered by hospital insurance.

  • Medical Insurance

    Preventive care, outpatient care, physician services, and some medical supplies are all covered by medical insurance.

  • Plans for Medicare Advantage

    These plans, which are provided by private companies, cover Parts A and B and frequently come with extra benefits like dental, vision, and hearing.

  • Coverage for Prescription Drugs

    helps in paying for prescription medications.

The Power of IUL
A Smarter Way to Retire

While traditional retirement plans like 401(k)s and IRAs are taxed upon withdrawal, an IUL lets you access your retirement income tax-free, ensuring you keep more of your hard-earned money. By leveraging compound interest and market-linked growth, you can build a secure, tax-efficient retirement plan without the risk of market losses.

Contact Us

Why Choose Medicare Insurance Plans ?

Medicare is a federal health insurance program primarily for individuals aged 65 and older, as well as certain younger individuals with disabilities. It comprises several parts

content.rendered:
Estate Planning

Safeguard Your Legacy and Make Sure Your Desires Are Fulfilled

Your Legacy, Your Plan, Your Peace of Mind.

Retirement planning necessitates a clever, well-rounded approach that preserves your savings while permitting room for expansion. A steady, dependable route to retirement security is provided by Lifetime Income, which provide a special solution by combining the chance to profit from market-linked gains with downside protection.

The One Easy Step to Begin

Making a will is an easy first step in estate planning. Your wishes for guardianship and asset distribution are outlined in this legal document. Other instruments, such as living trusts, powers of attorney, and healthcare directives, may also be required because a will alone might not be sufficient to cover everything. To make sure your estate plan is thorough and suited to your requirements, we are here to help you every step of the way.

Keep Your Loved Ones Safe

Make sure your assets are allocated in accordance with your wishes and that your family members are taken care of.

Assign Guardianship

Estate planning enables you to name a guardian to take care of your children in the event that you pass away.

Minimize Taxes

Proper estate planning can help reduce the taxes your heirs will have to pay, leaving more of your wealth to them.

Peace of Mind

You and your family will feel more at ease knowing that everything is in order, which will free you up to concentrate on what really matters today.

Why is Estate Planning Important?

Make Your Legacy a Priority Now

Estate planning is a crucial component of safeguarding your loved ones and securing your future, so don’t put off the inevitable. Our team of professionals can assist you in creating a customized estate plan that embodies your objectives and guarantees that your desires will always be carried out.

 

📞 To arrange your estate planning consultation and begin safeguarding your future, get in touch with us right now.

Contact Us

content.rendered:
Lifetime Income

Secure Growth With Protection

Safer Retirement With Protection and Growth

A durable retirement plan starts with income you can count on. Lifetime Income helps turn a portion of your savings into dependable monthly payments, while offering growth potential and protection from market downturns. The goal: cover essential expenses with confidence so your lifestyle stays on track—no matter what markets do. We’ll tailor the approach to your timeline and comfort level.

Lifetime Income: What Is It?

Lifetime Income is a strategy that converts savings into reliable paychecks, designed to last as long as you do.

  • Dependable Paychecks: Structured income designed to last for life.
  • Principal Protection: Guardrails to help shield your base savings from market losses.
  • Growth Potential: Opportunities for credited growth tied to an index.
  • Flexible Start Date: Begin income immediately or defer to a future date.

Buffer Market Downturns

Help protect your foundational savings, even when markets dip, so your plan stays on course.

Steady Retirement Income

Turn savings into predictable monthly payments to cover essentials with confidence.

Flexible Contributions & Options

Customize the amount you set aside and add features that match your priorities and timeline.

Confidence for You and a Spouse

Choose payout options that continue for two lives, supporting long-term peace of mind.

Why Choose Lifetime Income?

Are You a Good Fit for Lifetime Income?

Lifetime Income may fit if you want a stable, sustainable method to convert part of your nest egg into paychecks you won’t outlive. It’s especially helpful if market volatility makes you uneasy or you’d like a base income to cover non-negotiable expenses.

Let’s explore how a Lifetime Income strategy can support your retirement plan.

Contact Us

Lifetime Income helps turn a portion of your savings into dependable monthly payments, while offering growth potential and protection from market downturns. The goal: cover essential expenses with confidence so your lifestyle […]

content.rendered:
Preservation of Businesses

Safeguard Your Business for the Future

Protect Your Company's Future by Transitioning from Risk to Resilience.

Growth, innovation, and staying ahead of the competition are probably your top priorities as a business owner. However, in the midst of all the chaos, you should not neglect the importance of proper business preservation planning. Long-term success depends on protecting your company from unanticipated events, so doing so is not just a wise decision.

Business Preservation: What Is It?

The term “business preservation” describes tactics that shield your company from dangers and difficulties that might jeopardize its operations, worth, and longevity. This involves making plans for important occurrences like the death of a business owner, the illness or disability of a key employee, or even their death. You can make sure your company endures and prospers despite any challenges by putting in place thorough plans.

Protects Against Unexpected Events

Whether it’s the sudden loss of a key partner or the unexpected illness of a team leader, business preservation plans help you navigate challenging times without losing momentum.

Maximizes Financial Security

A well-structured plan ensures that your business is financially protected against unforeseen costs, so you don’t have to worry about unexpected expenses derailing your progress.

Attracts Investors and Partners

A business with a clear preservation plan is seen as more stable and attractive to potential investors and partners, providing confidence in its ability to weather challenges.

Secures Your
Legacy

For business owners who have spent years building their company, a solid preservation strategy ensures that their legacy lives on, whether through succession planning or protection of key assets.

Why Business Preservation is Essential in Business Finance

Act Immediately to Ensure
Long-Term Security

Although it’s simple to become engrossed in daily tasks, business preservation planning is essential to guaranteeing that your company is safe in any situation. Prioritize safeguarding the future of your company now rather than waiting for unforeseen circumstances to ruin your success.

content.rendered:
IUL for Kids

Start Building a Strong Financial Future for Your Child Today

More Than Insurance—A Legacy of Wealth for Your Child!"

As parents, we all want the best for our children, and helping them get a head start on their financial journey is one of the most impactful ways to set them up for success. Indexed Universal Life (IUL) for kids is a powerful financial tool that not only provides life insurance protection but also offers the opportunity to build wealth for your child’s future.

What is IUL for Kids?

An Indexed Universal Life (IUL) policy for children combines the benefits of life insurance with a growth component tied to a stock market index. The value of the policy grows through compound interest, which can significantly increase the savings over time, ensuring that your child has a solid financial foundation as they get older.

Compound Interest for Long-Term Growth

The earlier you start, the more powerful the compound interest effect becomes. This means that even small, consistent contributions can grow into a substantial sum over time.

Tax-Advantaged Growth

IUL policies offer tax-deferred growth, meaning your child’s money can grow without being taxed until withdrawals are made, allowing for more effective wealth accumulation.

Flexible Use of Funds

The cash value built up in the policy can be accessed later in life for a variety of needs—whether for college tuition, a down payment on a house, or even retirement savings.

Permanent Life Insurance Protection

 IUL not only builds wealth but also provides a lifelong life insurance policy, ensuring your child is protected no matter what happens in the future.

Why Choose IUL For kids?

Give Your Child
the Gift of Financial Security

By choosing IUL for Kids, you’re not just purchasing life insurance—you’re giving your child a powerful tool to build financial security, grow their wealth, and prepare for a bright future.

📞 Contact us today to learn more about how IUL can help build a financial foundation for your child’s future!

content.rendered:
Retirement Without Taxes

Indexed Universal Life Insurance Can Help You Retire Smarter.

Use Indexed Universal Life Insurance for Smart Retirement Planning Strategies

One of the smartest ways to strengthen your retirement plan is through Roth IRA conversions. By moving funds from taxable accounts such as 401(k), 403(b), or nonprofit 457 into a Roth IRA, you pay taxes now and unlock tax-free growth and withdrawals for the future. This strategy can help reduce your long-term tax burden, avoid required minimum distributions (RMDs), and create an estate planning advantage by passing on wealth to your heirs tax-free.

How Does an IUL Operate and What Is It?

A novel approach to accumulating wealth is an Indexed Universal Life Insurance (IUL) policy, which combines life insurance protection with a cash value component that increases in response to the performance of an index of the stock market, like the S&P 500. In contrast to conventional investments, an IUL enables you to profit from market expansion.

Tax-Free Withdrawals

All qualified withdrawals (after age 59½ and 5 years of holding the account) are tax-free, including investment earnings.

Withdraw Anytime

You can withdraw your original contributions at any time without penalties or taxes, giving you emergency flexibility.

No Required Minimum Distributions

Unlike Traditional IRAs, you’re not forced to take withdrawals, allowing your funds to continue compounding tax-free.

Estate Planning Advantage

Roth IRAs can be passed down to heirs tax-free, preserving more of your wealth. 

WHY CHOOSE A ROTH IRA FOR RETIREMENT PLANNING?

The Power of IUL
A Smarter Way to Retire

While traditional retirement plans like 401(k)s and IRAs are taxed upon withdrawal, an IUL lets you access your retirement income tax-free, ensuring you keep more of your hard-earned money. By leveraging compound interest and market-linked growth, you can build a secure, tax-efficient retirement plan without the risk of market losses.

Contact Us

Benefits of Long-Term
Care Planning

Thoughtful planning today can help safeguard your family, your lifestyle, and your independence if care is ever needed.

Care Support When You Need It Most

Life can change quickly. Long-Term Care Planning helps you stay in control if daily activities become difficult after an illness or injury. With clear, flexible options, you can line up support for in-home help or a care facility without disrupting your family’s routine. Our team designs a plan that fits your preferences, budget, and goals.

Long-Term Care Planning: What Is It?

It’s a personalized strategy that sets aside resources for extended care needs and outlines how and where you prefer to receive that care. Your plan can coordinate with existing coverage or stand on its own. Options may support assistance at home, adult day services, or residential care so you can choose what feels right. The result: comfort, continuity, and confidence for you and your loved ones.

Get Support When It Counts Most

When recovery takes longer than expected, your plan helps cover care so everyday bills and goals stay on track.

Protect Your Savings

Planning ahead helps you address care costs without quickly draining what you’ve worked hard to build.

Choose Where You Receive Care

Prefer home? A facility? Your plan is built around your preferences, with options that adapt as needs change.

Give Your Loved Ones Peace of Mind

Clear next steps reduce stress for family members and keep the focus on quality time and support.

Why Choose Long-Term Care Planning?

Don’t Wait Until It’s Urgent

A thoughtful plan today can make tomorrow’s decisions easier for everyone. Let’s design long-term care coverage that fits your life.

Contact Us

Your Financial Questions, Answered
What is Advanced Benefit Design?

We are a financial advice firm that can guide you through a variety of different financial tools that can protect you from risks.  This includes Lifetime Income, mortgage protection, and IUL for Kids, and Estate Planning.  

I already have life insurance why consider Long-Term Care Planning?

Life insurance helps loved ones after you’re gone; Long-Term Care Planning supports you if an illness or injury makes daily activities difficult. It lines up resources for in-home help or a care facility so routines, bills, and family goals stay on track. You choose how and where you prefer to receive care, and we tailor options to your budget and timeline. The result is comfort, continuity, and less stress for everyone.

How do I make a tax-free retirement plan?

IUL’s provide an effective tool to grow your investments during stock market booms, that also cap your investment losses during a stock market decline.  This program’s benefits are tax free, and can payout after retirement in a steady income stream.

What benefits do a Mortgage Protection Plan provide?

If you pass away or if you become too sick to make mortgage payments, the Mortgage Protection Plan will send you or your beneficiary money in order to pay off your mortgage.  This can protect new homeowners or their families from bankruptcy or foreclosure in the event of a major life crisis.

What kind of services can you provide my business?

We look into your business and give you personal advice on how to transfer, sell, or use your business for retirement.  We also guide you through a variety of contingencies in case a key member of your staff or partner is unable to continue working for that business.  With so many issues to plan and prepare for, give us a call today to help protect your business and plan for the future.

What do you do for Estate Planning?

We will go over with you your will, set up trusts, and work on securing estate exemptions that can shield your estate from unnecessary taxes or arbitrations.  We can assist you in setting a power of attorney and choosing an executor for your will.  

What is Lifetime Income and how does it work?

Lifetime Income turns a portion of your savings into dependable monthly paychecks designed to last as long as you do. It pairs growth potential linked to market performance (without direct market exposure) with features that help protect your principal from losses. You decide when payments start now or later and whether they continue for one or two lives. It’s a steady foundation to cover essential expenses and support the way you want to live in retirement.

Why would my kids need an IUL?

Investing in an IUL now, would give your child a safe, protected, and tax-free investment that they could cash out for any reason, or use as a retirement fund when they retire.

Wealth and Well-being
